panel_a_peer_relative_fingerprint: Yearly z; indicator-level SDI/year residual; mean
panel_b_parsimonious_score: z[log(1 + HAP-PM)] only; re-standardised to SD=1. A HAP-PM plus reverse-oriented clean-cooking composite was evaluated separately in a 2000–2023 complete-case sensitivity.

panel_a_peer_relative_fingerprint: Mean temperature, heat days, reversed cold days, DTR
AH, RH, RH>60% days, log1p precipitation, wet days
panel_b_parsimonious_score: Mean of z[absolute humidity], z[relative humidity], and z[RH >60% days], then re-standardised to empirical SD=1; precipitation was not included.
